title: lipochaeta lobata subsp. lobata
intro: Lipochaeta lobata subsp. lobata, also known as Hawaiian False Aster, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lipochaeta lobata subsp. lobata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
